pages.md:
# Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement

This Agreement is entered into as of the Effective Date by and between Acme Corporation and the Counterparty.

The parties wish to explore a potential business relationship and may disclose Confidential Information to one another.

items.md: This Agreement is entered into as of the Effective Date by and between Acme Corporation and the Counterparty.
The parties wish to explore a potential business relationship and may disclose Confidential Information to one another.

pages.md:
## 1. Confidentiality

Each party agrees to hold the other party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

## 2. Term

The obligations under this Agreement survive for a period of three years following the date of disclosure.
